WE ARE A WOMEN-OWNED, WOMEN-LED

GLOBAL BRAND

The beginning of a dream

OUR STORY


A girls trip in 2013 sparked the idea of what has become known as "Esteem Royale Cosmetics". Sisters, Odion Ejere & Idowu Ejere wanted to create skincare products with easy steps and multi-benefits to help people look good and feel confident. That is why at Esteem Royale, we believe every person’s beauty desire is important and individualistic. We want to feed this interesting individuality, empowering you to look, feel and be the best so you can achieve amazing things. Experience our signature coconut essence and you can proudly display our skin product in your bathroom or dresser.

Bold, classy, prestige.

OUR BRAND

Discover the most inclusive performance skincare collection for daily use. From face care to body care and beyond, our nutrient packed skincare products are designed to compliment each other helping you revive and restore your skin's radiance the way nature intended. No matter your skin type or complexion, find effective products for brightening, anti-aging and managing blemishes in our collections. We have 27 unique skincare products across 4 collections and 7 lip colors in our makeup line. We select our ingredients based on their efficacy in improving skin barrier function, repairing acid mantle, and maintaining correct pH levels. Our products are clarifying, moisturizing, brightening and anti-aging for people of all skin type.

We are beauty geeks

OUR INNOVATION

At the heart of everything we do at Esteem Royale, is a passion for creativity and innovative entrepreneurship. From our product design to ingredients and product packaging we stand out boldly in the industry. Esteem Royale Cosmetics is a vast network of talents which aid in our inexorable mission to broaden our innovation horizons. By utilizing artificial intelligence to personalize customers experience, and staying ahead of trends, we continue to create cult products that are loved by customers in across the globe.

We are the brand to look out for

AWARDS & PRESS

In April 2024, Esteem Royale Cosmetics was awarded 'Best Skincare Brand 2024 - Nigeria by Acquisition International.

In 2022, Stamp Nigeria named us, one of the 13 fastest growing Beauty brands and top 100 fastest growing consumer brands in Nigeria.

In 2021 our 2-in-1 Serum Facial Toner was Finalist in the 'Best New Skincare Product' category of the Pure Beauty Global Awards.

In 2020 our business was awarded the BIZZ Award for Excellence in the MENA region.

In 2019, we became the first Nigerian brand to win the Pure Beauty Global Awards when our Goat Milk Soap was awarded 'Best New Bath and Shower Product'.

Our brand, products and founders have been featured in; Global Cosmetics News, Amaka Studio, BellaNaija, Supplement Police, Beautylist, Entrepreneurs.ng, Amazing PR, Stamp Nigeria, and Pure Beauty Magazine.

We are Fanatical about you

OUR INSPO

We are fanatical about our customers and efficient customer service is central to the success of our business. Our customers are at the center of our research, product development, advertising, and product delivery. We pride ourselves in anticipating what customers want, vigilantly pursuing the development of new concepts and the creation of formulas to delight consumers, we never underestimate anyone’s desire to look and feel beautiful, appreciated and important.

About Esteem Royale Cosmetics

Esteem Royale is an audacious and innovative women-owned skin health brand founded in 2013. We offer a complete range of effective science-backed solutions formulated for all skin types and tones. Explore our easy-to-use Skin Type Chart, Skin Concern Canvas and get personalized product recommendations with our AI tool, Skinlyz. Discover your perfect skincare routine as you embark on a journey to skinfidence with Esteem Royale.

Skin positivity statement

At Esteem Royale, we believe that healthy, happy skin is a powerful foundation for confidence. We celebrate the unique beauty of every skin type, texture, and tone, and we want to empower you to feel comfortable and confident in your skin, while also offering solutions to address any concerns you may have. Our innovative skin health solutions are designed to help you reveal your most radiant self, so that you can pursue your dreams with unstoppable confidence.

Newsletter - become an insider

Become royalty, join our Tribe! Subscribe to our weekly newsletter for updates on secret sales and exclusive deals.

Product Information and Disclaimer

We want to empower you to make informed choices about your skincare routine. The information on our website, including product recommendations, are intended for your guidance only. The information provided here is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease and should not take the place of medical advice. Please seek advice from a qualified healthcare professional if you have skin conditions or diseases that require medical attention. Read full disclaimer
